title: Smart-Complaint-Categorization-app
description: A smart web application that automatically classifies public complaints into categories using Machine Learning. Built with Python and Streamlit, this project helps streamline complaint management for government or customer service systems.
summary: 该项目是一个基于机器学习的智能投诉分类网页应用，使用Python和Streamlit构建，能够自动将公众投诉归类，旨在帮助政府或客服系统简化投诉管理流程。
